scope.summary: Introduce the SaaS session-host backend foundation: ADR-0006, a top-level Rust axum server crate, Postgres migrations, confidential-at-rest crypto helpers, email magic-link auth, recovery-key/device primitives, S3-compatible file metadata, and a hosted-session manager scaffold. Local desktop mode remains unchanged.
goals: Add server/ Rust crate with axum, sqlx/Postgres, tower-http, tracing, object_store, and crypto dependencies
Add reversible migrations for users, magic links, devices, accounts, conversations, messages, files, hosted sessions, and audit events
Add confidential-at-rest envelope encryption helpers with tests proving ciphertext does not contain known plaintext
Add HTTP routes for auth, devices, accounts, messages, files, health, and realtime placeholder stream
Add Tauri cloud client commands that call the backend without returning Zalo credentials to the webview
nonGoals: Claiming live hosted Zalo QR/login/send proof without real account evidence

acceptance.description: Backend unit tests pass for crypto, auth token hashing, recovery-key verification, and session throttling.
Backend clippy is clean with warnings denied.
Existing Tauri core tests still pass after adding cloud commands.
Svelte type-check remains clean after adding cloud DTOs/client helpers.
Postgres-backed dev smoke proves migration up/down/up before API smoke.
